description_long: This object is a sleek, black charging case containing a pair of wireless ear-hook style earbuds. The case has a glossy finish and rounded edges, with a hinged lid that opens to reveal custom-molded slots for the earbuds. The earbuds themselves feature a distinctive curved hook designed to fit securely around the ear, with a circular accent near the earpiece that may house a button or indicator light. Small LED indicators are visible on the front of the case, likely showing charging or battery status. The interior of the case is contoured to snugly hold the earbuds in place, and the overall design is compact and portable. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metallic or rubberized accents on the earbuds.
description: A glossy black charging case with two wireless ear-hook earbuds, featuring a compact, rounded design and LED indicators.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open case with both earbuds seated inside, highlighting the ear-hook design and LED indicators.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid open, revealing the depth of the case and the profile of one earbud removed from its slot.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed case, with the tops of the earbuds and their hooks just visible above the case edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, showing the other earbud removed and the interior contours of the case.
